_comment: CT-0415-05 Layer-4 fix v2 — system-level managed settings for Claude Code Mac app. Created 2026-04-15 per Perplexity sonar-pro review of the Layer-4 regression. Path on Mac: /Library/Application Support/ClaudeCode/managed-settings.json. Install with bin/install-claude-managed-settings.sh (requires sudo). Per code.claude.com/docs/en/permissions: 'managed settings cannot be overridden by user or project settings' — this is the strongest tier of policy enforcement, sits above ~/.claude/settings.json + ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/config.json + .claude/settings.local.json.
_tool_name_source: Verified against `claude --help` output 2026-04-15: --allowedTools accepts patterns like 'Bash(git:*) Edit'. CamelCase-with-no-suffix is the real tool ID. NOTE: 'BashExec' and 'SearchFiles' from Perplexity's reply were INCORRECT names — actual CLI evidence shows Bash + Glob (no SearchFiles tool exists on Mac app side; Drive MCP search_files is mcp__<uuid>__search_files which matches mcp__* wildcard).
